description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:0.26 Docker image. Define a pages job (runs in the deploy stage) that executes the command hugo, publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a test job (runs in the test stage) that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch. No services, caches, or extra variables are needed.
